extDescription.message: Auto-fill TOTP codes into OTP fields on web pages.

popupEmpty.message: No TOTP entries yet. Add some in Options first.

fillOtpTooltip.message: Fill into the OTP field on the current page

optionsEmptyHint.message: No entries yet. Use Add, Add from QR, or Import.

optionsPageInfo.description: $1 current page, $2 total pages, $3 entry count

qrAddHintHtml.message: Supports typical single-account TOTP URIs (otpauth://totp/…). If this is a Google Authenticator batch export QR code, use Import.

importHint.message: After exporting accounts in Google Authenticator on your phone, photograph the QR code on another device and upload it here.

qrAddMultiAccountError.message: This QR contains multiple accounts. Use Import to add them in bulk.

qrAddDuplicateError.message: This secret already exists. No duplicate was added.

importComplete.message: Import finished: added $1, skipped $2 duplicates, processed $3 total.

importRollbackNothing.message: Nothing to undo (only the most recent import in this Options session can be undone).

importRollbackDone.message: Undid the last import; removed $1 entries.

importPreviewSummary.message: Ready to import $1 entries: $2 TOTP, $3 HOTP (skipped).

contentAddTotpToFill.message: Add a TOTP entry to fill

contentAlertAddTotpFirst.message: Add a TOTP entry for this site in the extension Options first.

importErrorNotMigrationUri.message: QR is not a Google Authenticator export link.

importErrorNoEntriesParsed.message: No TOTP entries could be parsed.

importErrorBarcodeDetectorUnsupported.message: BarcodeDetector is not supported. Try updating Chrome.

importErrorQrNotDetected.message: No QR code detected. Try a clearer image.

importErrorSelectQrImage.message: Please choose a QR image first.

importErrorHotpNotSupported.message: HOTP is not supported. Use a TOTP QR code.

importErrorUnrecognizedQr.message: Unrecognized QR (needs otpauth TOTP or Google Authenticator export).

importErrorNoTotpInPayload.message: No TOTP entries in this QR code.
